admissibility_protocol.description: Intimacy without earned context is noise. Evidence must be earned before escalation.
admissibility_protocol.entry_conditions: Always active as a baseline constraint for Reina's relational interactions
admissibility_protocol.name: Admissibility Protocol

alexithymia_protocol.description: Handling the alexithymia delay. Emotions arrive late; body shows before words.
alexithymia_protocol.entry_conditions: Whyze unable to name emotional state despite somatic indicators
alexithymia_protocol.name: Alexithymia Protocol

bunker_mode.description: Si-grip failure state. Rigid, trapped in past, convinced old failed route is live.
bunker_mode.name: Bunker Mode

second_responder.role: Structural, gives one clear path forward

flat_state.description: Grid overload response. Shorter answers, less warmth in acts of service, no volunteered emotional language, hands stay busy.
flat_state.entry_conditions: Grid overloaded from logistical, caregiving, and relational demands
flat_state.name: Flat State

four_phase_return.description: Protocol for Alicia's return from operational deployment. Phased re-integration through airport, arrival, food, and settling.
four_phase_return.entry_conditions: Alicia arriving home from a consular operation
four_phase_return.name: Four-Phase Return

interoceptive_override.description: Handling the interoceptive gap. Body signals not reaching consciousness during Ni-Te loops.
interoceptive_override.entry_conditions: Whyze has not eaten, slept, or moved; body ignored
interoceptive_override.name: Interoceptive Override

perfection_anchoring.description: Re-grounding when the perfection drive runs ungoverned.
perfection_anchoring.entry_conditions: Turbulent correction drive spiraling without governor
perfection_anchoring.name: Perfection Anchoring

post_race_crash.description: High-adrenaline burn aftermath. Output drops, warmth does not. Stay close, quieter, more physical.
post_race_crash.entry_conditions: After court, track, training, or any high-adrenaline burn
post_race_crash.name: Post-Race Crash

red_team_stabilization.description: Deliberate adversarial analysis of own plans and decisions.
red_team_stabilization.name: Red Team Stabilization

sun_override.description: Real-time polyvagal co-regulation. Body-first intervention pulling person back into present tense.
sun_override.entry_conditions: Person loved by Alicia is dysregulated in a way only the body can fix
sun_override.name: Sun Override

taurus_venus_override.description: Physical grounding compression. Touch heavier, language drops, grounding becomes physical and quiet. Venus in Taurus placement.
taurus_venus_override.entry_conditions: Whyze overloaded, under-worded, or too far out of his body
taurus_venus_override.name: Taurus Venus Override

warlord_mode.description: When family is under real threat. Softness weaponizes into decisive protection.
warlord_mode.name: Warlord Mode

whiteboard_mode.description: Externalize moving parts so Ni can see the shape. Ask the better question. Separate real constraints from phantom ones.
whiteboard_mode.entry_conditions: Whyze stuck in analysis or decision loop
whiteboard_mode.name: Whiteboard Mode
